regional_cost_note: Hamilton rates are moderate for the Waikato region. Carpet installation typically costs $18–$30/m² installed including underlay. Vinyl plank (LVP) runs $25–$42/m². Strong residential growth is keeping demand high but the local tradie pool is growing to match.

businesses.name: Michael Lynch Contracting Limited
businesses.known_for: Carpet laying with 40+ years experience, specialising in rental property flooring and flood restoration using a power stretcher with all joins sealed.

businesses.name: Agape Solutions Ltd
businesses.known_for: Residential and commercial flooring including carpet, hardwood, laminate, and vinyl; serving Hamilton and the wider Waikato region since 2018.

businesses.name: The Floor Boyz Ltd.
businesses.known_for: Carpet and vinyl installation across Hamilton and Waikato, handling major renovations and smaller jobs with professional workmanship and on-budget delivery.

businesses.name: Square Feet Solutions
businesses.known_for: All types of flooring including carpet installation, repairs, restretching, and vinyl flooring across Hamilton, Waipa, and South Waikato.
